prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约24416→26015→30166→36697→32764名，整体呈后移趋势，近5年累计后移约8350名；2024年出现明显后移（较2023年下降约65 31名），2025年有所回升（较2024年前移约3933名），波动较大；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年129人、2022年139人、2023年150人、2024年149人、2025 年151人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划163人，较2025年增加12人（扩招约7.9%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65区间，属中上游211；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排 名第52（较热），综合热度约62.6万，短视频曝光量处于211中游水平，报考关注度一般偏热；水利工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，均为 该校王牌学科；水利类（大禹强化班）2025年最低位次约16017名，远低于校线，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会 热度持续高热；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年44.0万人增加约3.6%，竞争加剧；省控线数据2026年缺失，；河海大学位于江苏南京 ，在广东省招生占比约3–4%（2024年约99人/全国约2760人），属跨省招生中等规模；广东考生对长三角高校地域偏好较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年扩 招约7.9%及广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%，扩招与考生增加双重作用下竞争加剧，位次预计后移；预测最低位次约34527名，区间34027–35027名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 24416 → 26015 → 30166 → 36697 → 32764, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8350 places over the past 5 years; in 2024, there was a significant backward shift (a decrease of about 6531 places compared to 2023), and in 2025, there was a recovery (an increase of about 3933 places compared to 2024), indicating large fluctuations; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 129 in 2021, 139 in 2022, 150 in 2023, 149 in 2024, and 151 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 163, an increase of 12 students compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 7.9%), which slightly intensifies competition and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it is approximately 63rd, with a stable ranking in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 626,000, and short video exposure is at the mid-level among 211 universities, with application attention generally moderate to hot; Water Resources Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, and Environmental Science and Engineering is A, all of which are the university's flagship disciplines; the Water Resources Category (Dayu Intensive Class) had a minimum ranking of about 16,017 in 2025, far below the university's admission line, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to be highly popular in society; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and its enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 3–4% (approximately 99 out of about 2,760 nationwide in 2024), which is a medium scale for cross-provincial enrollment; Guangdong candidates have a strong regional preference for universities in the Yangtze River Delta.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 expansion of about 7.9%, and the increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong by about 3.6%, competition intensifies under the dual effects of expansion and candidate increase, and the ranking is expected to shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 34,527, with a range of 34,027–35,027.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 34,027–35,027, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Water Resources Category Dayu Class, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Port, Waterway and Coastal Engineering, Civil Engineering, Environmental categories) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 34,027), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; its reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 626,000, indicating generally moderate to high application attention; Hohai University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Water Conservancy Engineering (A+), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A), but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Accounting, English, etc.) have low relevance to these advantageous disciplines, limiting disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a divided and wait-and-see social popularity, Accounting is divided and wait-and-see, English is generally wait-and-see, and liberal arts majors overall have stable popularity; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and its History Category enrollment scale in Guangdong Province is small (16 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Guangdong examinees have a strong regional preference for universities in the Yangtze River Delta.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 18.8% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the approximately 11.6% increase in History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, the enrollment reduction slightly eases competition, but the significant increase in examinees partially offsets this effect, leading to an expected slight forward shift in rankings; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6349, with a range of 5849–6849.
